## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content planning, and AI-related keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Search impressions for Superhuman content are spiking, with multiple web pages gaining traction (3-6 clicks each)](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [AI-related keywords research conducted; focus on terms like "AI native," "agentic AI," and "AI workflow automation"](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Superhuman planning "Summer of AI" campaign in June, including a webinar on best AI native tools for productivity](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Agreement to shift to biweekly meetings with async updates in between](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant spike in impression count for Superhuman-related search queries](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Multiple web pages gaining 3-6 clicks each, with more content in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Notion vs. Superhuman query already appearing in search results](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [New competitor blog post and landing page for Notion Mail launched Friday; indexed quickly due to strong domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

### AI-Related Keyword Research

  - [Research conducted on terms like "AI native," "agentic AI," and "AI workflow automation"](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - ["AI native" shows higher search volume without hyphens (e.g., "AI native applications")](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - ["Agentic AI" emerging as a potentially important term](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - ["AI workflow automation" identified as a promising keyword](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Productivity-related AI searches show potential (e.g., "AI productivity tools," "Best AI tools for product managers")](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

### Content Planning

  - [Superhuman planning "Summer of AI" campaign for June](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Webinar planned: "Best AI native tools for your productivity stack"](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Potential blog post on top AI native tools (timing TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on AI-related topics in upcoming content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Full analytics update planned for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Agreement to provide async updates in Slack on off-weeks, including pipeline and quick metrics](https://fathom.video/share/oWBrVakhn52yVsJwk4vsHYsyj4XjYXbR?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
